I think this is the primary open question right now % the getBlobsV3 latency.

author: sukunrt
content: There's a getBlobsV4 proposed for gloas for sparse blob pools. We should update the gloas specs to use this for fetching blob data. https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/774
